summary: Comprehensive testing of Hospital Transfer Management System completed. Backend APIs working excellently (92.3% success). Frontend role-based dashboards, authentication, CRUD operations, and navigation all functioning properly. Minor UI selector issues with dropdowns, but core functionality solid.

minor_issues.issue: Admin role cannot access trip pool (returns 403)
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - only conductor/jefe_turno should access pool

ui_bugs.issue: Some dropdown option selections require specific selectors and force=True

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@hospital.cl / admin123 -> /admin redirect
User registration (solicitante role) with pending approval message
Admin user approval workflow in users section
Vehicle CRUD - create vehicle, change status successfully
Destination CRUD - create and delete operations
Dashboard stats display (6 metrics showing correctly)
Requester dashboard and trip creation workflow
Password recovery flow with reset tokens
JWT authentication and role-based access control
URL protection - role-based route access control
